name: Candied Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half lengthwise. Scoop out and discard the seeds.
2. Cut the squash crosswise into 1-inch slices.
3. Arrange the slices slightly overlapping, in a buttered 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Bake, covered, in a 375 degrees F (190 C) oven for 35 minutes or until almost tender.
5. Combine the melted butter, brown sugar, maple-flavored syrup, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
6. Spoon the mixture over the squash.
7. Continue baking, uncovered, for an additional 15 minutes or until the squash is tender, basting occasionally with the syrup mixture from the bottom of the pan.
8. Makes 8 servings.
